name: Can I sue my employer if I got really sick from toxic exposure at work in West Valley City?
description: Generally no, workers comp is exclusive remedy in Utah.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer if I got really sick from toxic exposure at work in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Generally no, workers comp is exclusive remedy in Utah.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, Utah's exclusive remedy rule limits you to workers comp for work illnesses, barring rare exceptions like intentional harm.[1] This prevents tort lawsuits for negligence but allows third-party suits.[1] Key factors: Prove intent or no insurance coverage for exceptions; staffing agencies covered if insured. Focus on comp claim first; lawyer can check third-party liability like equipment makers.
